title: WITH table AS... UPDATE ignores the WHERE conditions on table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id Int32, name String, age Int32 CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id Int32, user_id Int32, amount Decimal(10, 2), PRIMARY KEY (order_id), INDEX idx_user_id (user_id));
UPDATE orders SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE user_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE age > 20);
key_bug_features: UPDATE statement ignores WHERE conditions in CTE
